title: Postmortem – API errors for a small number of developer accounts (Aug 21, 2024)
excerpt:

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Earlier today, some developer accounts were unable to access the monday API. If you are an app developer, you may have seen errors when testing your app in your developer account.

When we received reports about this issue, our dev team identified the issue and pushed a fix within a few hours. The issue was resolved around 1pm GMT.

Only a very small portion of developer accounts were affected (less than 25). No customer accounts were affected.

In the interest of transparency, we’re sharing this update – despite it having a relatively small scope.

If you’re still having issues, please open a technical support request here.
